description: Advanced real-time water simulation system featuring dynamic waves, reflections, and physics-based interactions.
Modular combat system with responsive controls, hit detection, and smooth animations. Supports combo mechanics, damage handling, and extensible features for scalable gameplay design.

Seamless character switching system inspired by Genshin Impact, allowing players to instantly swap between characters with smooth transitions, and responsive controls. Designed for fluid gameplay, supporting animations, cooldown handling, and scalable party management.
Fast-paced rhythm gameplay with precise timing windows, satisfying hit feedback, and dynamic combo scoring.
Live YouTube data display system with seamless backend syncing and responsive UI updates.
Advanced FPS system with raycast-based hit detection, recoil patterns, weapon modularity, and client-server synchronization for responsive gameplay.
Emote system with smooth animation playback and responsive controls.
Genshin-style character selection UI with smooth scrolling, focus transitions, and fully scripted interaction system.
